Bus Timings

Terminus 2 Bus Stop, Al Nahda 1, Dubai

July 4, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop is a significant transit hub located in the vibrant Al Nahda area of Dubai. Serving both residents and visitors, this bus stop provides convenient access to a variety of local amenities, shopping centers, and dining options. Positioned strategically, it facilitates easy travel to key destinations within Dubai, making it a crucial part of the city’s public transportation network.

Address

Al Nahda 1, Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop here.

Located in the bustling Al Nahda area, the Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop is a pivotal element of Dubai’s public transport system. This stop is strategically connected to multiple bus routes, facilitating easy travel to various parts of the city. Its central position near key amenities, shopping centers, and dining options makes it a vital hub for both residents and visitors exploring the Al Nahda neighborhood.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop is well-serviced by the following bus routes, offering frequent and reliable transportation throughout the day:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
22 City Centre MS 7:36 PM
F23 Stadium MS 7:44 PM
24 International City 7:48 PM
22 City Centre MS 7:56 PM
20A Al Warsan 3 7:59 PM
F23 Stadium MS 8:02 PM
24 International City 8:08 PM
22 City Centre MS 8:17 PM
F23 Stadium MS 8:17 PM
20A Al Warsan 3 8:29 PM
F23 Stadium MS 8:32 PM
24 International City 8:38 PM
22 City Centre MS 8:40 PM
F23 Stadium MS 8:47 PM
20 Al Warsan 3 8:59 PM
F23 Stadium MS 9:00 PM
22 City Centre MS 9:00 PM
24 International City 9:08 PM
22 City Centre MS 9:20 PM
F23 Stadium MS 9:20 PM
24 International City 9:38 PM
22 City Centre MS 9:40 PM
F23 Stadium MS 9:41 PM
20A Al Warsan 3 9:50 PM
F23 Stadium MS 10:01 PM

Bus Route Details

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop is served by several key bus routes:

  • F23 Route: Runs frequently to Al Nahda 1, Terminus, with departures starting at 5:13 AM and continuing until 10:04 PM.

  • 20A Route: Connects Al Nahda with Al Warsan 3, with buses operating from 5:34 AM to 8:29 AM and resuming from 12:35 PM to 3:34 PM. This route is suitable for those traveling to Al Warsan 3.
  • 24 Route: Provides connections between Al Nahda and Dubai Festival City, with service from 5:36 AM to 10:01 PM. It offers a reliable option for those traveling to Dubai Festival City or nearby areas.
  • 22 Route: Links Al Nahda with City Centre MS, operating from 6:40 AM to 9:35 PM.
  • F23A Route: Runs to Stadium Bus Station, with departures from 6:13 AM to 4:43 PM.

Nearby Destinations

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2 Bus Stop is centrally located, offering easy access to a range of local amenities, shopping centers, and dining options:

Restaurants

  • Grill Hut Restaurant: Offers a variety of grilled specialties.
  • Miya Bhai Restaurant: Popular for authentic South Asian cuisine.
  • Chili’s Restaurant: Provides casual dining with a diverse menu.
  • Orient Grill Restaurant: Serves a selection of Middle Eastern delicacies.

Shopping Centers

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Sahara Centre Mall: A major shopping destination with various retail outlets.

  • Daiso Japan: Known for its affordable and diverse products.
  • Toysrus Sahara Mall: Offers a wide range of toys and games.
  • Areej Shopping Centre: Features a range of stores and shopping options.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Eatemad Home Health Care: Provides home healthcare services.

  • IMARA Healthcare UAE: Offers various medical services.
  • Star Healthcare: Known for comprehensive healthcare offerings.

Pharmacies

  • Aster Pharmacy 118: Offers a range of medicines and health products.

  • Life Pharmacy Life Al Nahda: Provides pharmaceutical products and services.
  • Novo Nahda Sahara Pharmacy: Known for its extensive selection of medications.

Accommodation

  • Emirates Star Hotel Apartments: Offers comfortable accommodations.

  • Lavender Hotel Apartments: Ideal for long-term stays.
  • Miramar Hotel Apartments: Provides a range of hotel apartment options.
  • Golden Crown Hotel Apartments: Known for its amenities and location.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1(113m): 19, 20A, 22, 24, X22

  2. Al Nahda 1, Burj Al Noor 1(154m): 19, 20A, 22, 24, F23, F23A, X22

  3. Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1(274m): 24

  4. Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 2(282m): 19

  5. Al Nahda 1, Burj Al Noor 2(322m): 19, 20A, 22, 24, F23, F23A, X22

Its strategic position and well-connected bus routes make it an important hub for both daily commuters and visitors exploring Dubai. Whether you’re heading to local attractions, shopping centers, or healthcare facilities, this bus stop provides a reliable and efficient gateway to various destinations within the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 4, 2025.
